overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game showing a character with a large backpack traversing a dark, mountainous wilderness at night. The character walks along rocky terrain and cliff edges under a starry, cloudy sky, approaching a distant structure with lights.

events.description: character stops walking and looks up at the starry sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through rocky mountain terrain with a large backpack, then stopping to observe the surroundings

entered.detail: dark silhouetted mountain peaks against the night sky
uneven rocky ground with scattered boulders and patches of grass
dark night sky with visible stars and scattered clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dark, open mountain wilderness at night, traversing rocky terrain under a starry sky. Around the 10-second mark, the character stops to look up at the sky before continuing.

events.description: distant structure with blue lights becomes visible on the ridge ahead

agents.ego_description: resuming the journey uphill toward a distant ridge line

entered.detail: distant man-made structure with vertical blue lights on the mountain ridge

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the mountainous terrain, approaching a ridge. A distant structure with blue lights becomes visible on the horizon, providing a focal point in the dark landscape.

events.description: terrain opens up to reveal a cliff edge with vast ocean or void below

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the narrow cliff edge path with the ocean drop to the right

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff dropping off to the ocean below
dark expanse of water or foggy void visible beyond the cliff

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a cliff edge and turns to walk along the narrow path, with a vast dark ocean or void visible to the right. The distant light structure remains visible on the left while the character navigates the dangerous cliffside trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark mountain wilderness that gradually shifts from an open plateau to a precarious cliffside path. It begins with the character traversing rocky terrain under a starry sky, pausing briefly to look upward before pressing forward. As the character approaches a ridge, the oppressive darkness of the landscape is broken by the appearance of a distant structure emitting blue lights on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the character reaches a cliff edge, turning to navigate a narrow trail where a vast, dark void opens up to the right. Finally, the camera tracks the character along this dangerous ledge, keeping the distant blue lights as a focal point against the surrounding night.
